upload.title: Upload Turkcell Invoice PDF
upload.description: Upload your monthly Turkcell invoice. The system reads line data from the PDF and compares it with your inventory.

invoiceOnly.title: Lines on Invoice, Not in System
invoiceOnly.description: These phone numbers appear on the invoice but are not registered in your SIM inventory. You are paying for them but not tracking them.

costIncrease.title: Lines Charged Higher Than Expected
costIncrease.description: Invoice amounts for these lines are at least 1 TRY higher than your recorded unit cost.

loss.title: Lines Where Cost Exceeds Sale Price
loss.description: Amount paid to Turkcell exceeds what you charge the customer. This is a direct loss.

inventoryOnly.title: In System, Not on Invoice
inventoryOnly.description: These Turkcell lines are in your SIM inventory but show no charge on this invoice.

alerts.unknownCostDescription: Profit/loss may still be calculated, but variance analysis is not possible without cost. Enter costs on SIM card records.

errors.parseFailed: PDF could not be read. Please upload a valid Turkcell invoice file.
errors.noLinesFound: No line data found in the PDF. The invoice format may not be supported.
errors.fetchFailed: Inventory data could not be loaded. Please try again.
errors.integrityWarning: Invoice integrity warning: Line totals do not match the cover page total. Some pages may be unreadable — results may be incomplete.
